description: Property-specific configurations for lease document selection and processing

lease_document_selection.notes: Prefer documents with 'Lease Document' title or PDF attachments with specific naming pattern. Exclude e-Sign modifications and applicant uploads. Require minimum 100KB file size.

reconciliation.notes: Property was acquired mid-lease in January 2026. Scheduled charges before this date should not flag as 'Scheduled Not Billed' exceptions since we have no transaction history before acquisition.
